mapper.update:
UPDATE payments
payment_method = #{paymentMethodId},
idempotency_key = #{idempotencyKey},
amount = #{amount},
currency = #{currency},
status = #{status}::payment_status,
paid_at = #{paidAt},
updated_at = #{updatedAt},
WHERE id = #{id}
mapper.insert: INSERT INTO payments (merchant_id, customer_id, payment_method_id, idempotency_key, amount, currency, description, status, paid_at, created_at, updated_at) VALUES (#{merchantId}, #{customerId}, #{paymentMethodId}, #{idempotencyKey}, #{amount}, #{currency}, #{description}, #{status}::payment_status, #{paidAt}, #{createdAt}, #{updatedAt})
